summary: Frontend-only testing completed for RunWars React Native Expo app (iteration 2). All 7 test scenarios passed. Verified h3-js import fix (no 'Unknown encoding: utf-16le' crash), RunWars glass-style UI rebranding, H3 conversion accuracy, location tracking with mock GPS, and all testIDs present.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ h3-js import fix successful: Changed from named imports to namespace import (import * as h3 from 'h3-js') - no 'Unknown encoding: utf-16le' crash
✅ text-encoding-polyfill imported in _layout.tsx for web compatibility
✅ RunWars branding successfully implemented with glass-style UI (semi-transparent dark panels, subtle borders)
✅ Ref-based hex deduplication (visitedRef, lastHexRef) working correctly - prevents re-renders
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes (error-screen, error-message, error-icon, loading-screen, loading-indicator, web-fallback-screen, hex-count-web)
✅ Proper React Native components used (View, Text, ActivityIndicator, ScrollView)
✅ Good error handling for permission states with glass-style error card
✅ Clean platform-specific file separation (HexMap.tsx vs HexMap.web.tsx)
✅ H3 conversion logic is accurate - verified SF coords (37.7749, -122.4194) → H3 index 89283082803ffff and NYC coords (40.7128, -74.0060) → H3 index 892a1072803ffff at resolution 9
✅ Glass card styling verified: backgroundColor rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06), borderRadius 20px, borderWidth 1px
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed. Used mock geolocation for testing (SF: 37.7749, -122.4194 and NYC: 40.7128, -74.0060).
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is iteration 2 of the RunWars frontend-only React Native Expo app. The h3-js import was fixed from named imports to namespace import (import * as h3 from 'h3-js') which resolved the 'Unknown encoding: utf-16le' crash. UI was rebranded from HexTracker to RunWars with Apple glass-style dark panels. All tests passed successfully. The app uses expo-location for GPS tracking and h3-js for converting coordinates to H3 hex cells. On web, react-native-maps doesn't work, so a web fallback component (HexMap.web.tsx) is used. H3 conversion is accurate, permission handling works correctly, and all required testIDs are present.

test_results_detail.test_1_app_loads_without_crash: PASSED - App loads without 'Unknown encoding: utf-16le' crash. The h3-js namespace import fix worked correctly.
test_results_detail.test_2_permission_denied_glass_style: PASSED - Error screen displays with glass-style card (backgroundColor: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06), borderRadius: 20px, borderWidth: 1px) and correct message 'Location permission is required to track your movement.'
test_results_detail.test_3_location_granted_sf: PASSED - Web fallback screen displays correctly with RunWars branding, Territory Tracker subtitle, SF coordinates (37.774900, -122.419400), hex count of 1, and H3 index 89283082803ffff
test_results_detail.test_4_h3_conversion_correctness: PASSED - H3 conversion verified accurate. SF coords (37.7749, -122.4194) at resolution 9 produces H3 index 89283082803ffff (starts with '8928' as expected)
test_results_detail.test_5_location_change_nyc: PASSED - Location change to NYC (40.712800, -74.006000) processed correctly. Hex count shows 1 for new location with different H3 index 892a1072803ffff (not starting with '8928')
test_results_detail.test_6_glass_ui_elements: PASSED - All glass-style UI elements verified: RunWars branding, Territory Tracker subtitle, hex count display, coords display, captured H3 indexes list
test_results_detail.test_7_testids_present: PASSED - All required testIDs present and functional: error-screen, error-message, error-icon, loading-screen, loading-indicator, web-fallback-screen, hex-count-web
